    Method
    Description
    <T> @Nullable T
    MongoOperations.findAndModify(Query query, UpdateDefinition update, FindAndModifyOptions options, Class<T> entityClass)
    Triggers findAndModify to apply provided Update on documents matching Criteria of given Query taking FindAndModifyOptions into account.

    Triggers findAndModify to apply provided Update on documents matching Criteria of given Query taking FindAndModifyOptions into account.
